<!-- What problem does this solve? Who benefits from it? -->

<!-- Describe the desired behavior in detail. Include API contracts, UI flows, or config changes if relevant. -->

- [ ] Dashboard UI (`packages/ui`)

- [ ] Docker / Docker Compose / scripts
- [ ] Shared package (`packages/shared`)
